query:
SELECT ct.id, ct.contractNumber, ct.contractName, ct.sectorKey, co.nameAr as contractorName 
FROM contracts ct 
LEFT JOIN contractors co ON ct.contractorId = co.id 
ORDER BY ct.sectorKey, ct.id 
LIMIT 30;
command:
